verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنفَطَرَتْ

verses.text: and when the stars are scattered,
and when the seas are made to gush forth,
and when the graves are ransacked,
(then each) person will know what he has sent forward and kept back.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
verses.text: Human! What has deceived you about your generous Lord,
who created you and fashioned you and balanced you?

canonical_variants.english: Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?
Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?
Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?
Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?
Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?
Who created you and formed you and perfectly proportioned you?

verses.quran_arabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍۢ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
verses.text: He constructed you in whatever form He pleased.
By no means! No! You (still) call the Judgment a lie.
Surely (there are) indeed watchers over you,
Surely the pious will indeed be in (a place of) bliss,
and surely the depraved will indeed be in a Furnace.
They will burn in it on the Day of Judgment,
and from it they will not be absent.
What will make you know what the Day of Judgment is?

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Once again, what will make you know what the Day of Judgment is?

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌۭ لِّنَفْسٍۢ شَيْـًۭٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلَّهِ
verses.text: The Day when no one will have any power to (help) another. The command on that Day (will belong) to God.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمُ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَاَلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a day when no self is able to avail another self in anything

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمُ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَاَلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a day when no self is able to avail another self in anything

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمُ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a day when no self is able to avail another self in anything

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمُ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a day when no self is able to avail another self in anything
